name: testDataMatching
description: Verify, that the data in Transaction Details Dialog corresponds to the data in Transactions table
descriptionHtml: Verify, that the data in Transaction Details Dialog corresponds to the data in Transactions table

steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0912.055416.28.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify, that the data in Transaction Details Dialog corresponds to the data in Transactions table

steps.name: Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Click on the first transaction from the table
Verify: 'Status' value is the same as in the table
Verify: Business unit reference is the same as in the table
Verify: 'Amount' value and Currency are the same as in the table
Verify: 'Card type' is the same as in table
